creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
The author of the Ion window managers has redesigned his website,
including moving distfiles to another directory. The MASTER_SITES in the
ion-2 and ion-3ds port are broken.

Please note that I am only the maintainer of the Ion 3 port!

Fix: 

Apply the following patch:

	http://g-rave.nl/junk/freebsd-ports-ion-distfiles.diff
How-To-Repeat: Try to fetch ion-2 or ion-3ds.
